title: cli/commands.rs FILE_MAX_CHUNKS (230) diverges from messages.rs MAX_CHUNKS (102)
description: Trigger: messages.rs deserialize_total_chunks caps total_chunks at 102 (floor(1 GiB / 10 MiB)). But commands.rs uses FILE_MAX_CHUNKS = 230 as its guard (lines ~1266 and ~1507 in both DELIVER and SEALED_DELIVER handlers). The CLI guard is dead code: total_chunks > 102 is already rejected by deserialization before the match arm runs. Bad behavior now: none (defense-in-depth is safe). Maintenance risk: if the deserialization cap is ever raised (e.g. to 230), the CLI would allocate vec![None; 230] slots per transfer (16 concurrent = 3680 slots) then receive up to 230 * 10 MiB = 2.3 GiB of chunk data before any size check runs. Fix: use the same constant (MAX_CHUNKS = 102) in commands.rs, or import the constant from messages.rs.
